scenario: GitLab local -> demo project -> GitLab CI -> Docker runner -> build image -> push registry

pipeline.description: Validate project metadata and pinned base image.
Build deterministic image tag from commit SHA.
Push image to local GitLab registry using CI-provided credentials.

controls.description: Scripts must not echo registration or registry tokens.
No silent validate_certs false pattern is allowed.
No undocumented latest tag is allowed.
Runner privileged mode is disabled by default.

findings.description: The sample CI models Docker-in-Docker as a local lab concern. Production use requires explicit risk review.
